'''Tefau''' was a location<ref name="CCG">{{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=Soth Petikkin}}</ref> in the [[Tefau system/Legends|Tefau system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Suolriep sector/Legends|Suolriep sector]].<ref name="AOC" /> [[Soth Petikkin]], a [[Tefaun]] who worked as a recruiter for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], was from Tefau.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|22|Petikkin, Soth}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Tefau was created in [[1998]] for Soth Petikkin's card in the ''[[Special Edition Limited]]'' set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CCG" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Tefau [[Star system/Legends|system]], and thus Tefau itself, in grid square S-9.<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
